meta.title: Kleverbill — Revenue Recovery Calculator
meta.description: Find out how much money unpaid invoices are costing your business every month, and how much Kleverbill can recover.
meta.ogDescription: Most companies underestimate their invoice losses by 2–3x.

calculatorForm.headlinePre: How much money are unpaid invoices
calculatorForm.subline2: We built a free calculator to show your real loss.
calculatorForm.disclaimer: The figures shown in this calculator are illustrative only and are not intended to represent accurate financial projections.

stepRevenue.title: What is your monthly invoice volume?
stepRevenue.latePaymentRateHint: Unpaid before the first payment reminder
stepRevenue.unpaidRateHint: Unpaid after sending the last reminder

stepChasing.title: How much time does your team spend chasing payments?
stepChasing.hintTotalHours: How much time a member of your team spends sending reminders and chasing payments
stepChasing.hintPerInvoiceHours: How much time is spent chasing per invoice
stepChasing.hintHic: How much one hour of your worker's labour costs
stepChasing.hintTeamMembers: Number of staff members chasing payments

livePreview.p2: This is not a contact collection tool — all users see their results completely anonymously and free.

resultsHero.subtitle: Adjust the sliders below to explore different scenarios.
resultsHero.delayedDesc: money held up because of late payers
resultsHero.chasingDesc: labour cost of your team spent collecting late payments

scenarioExplorer.title: Adjust your assumptions
scenarioExplorer.hicSublabel: Cost per hour of staff time
scenarioExplorer.tmSublabel: Number of staff members chasing payments
scenarioExplorer.krrSublabel: See how efficient Kleverbill would need to be to pay for itself

pricingAnchor.label: On {tier} ({priceLabel}), that's an estimated:
pricingAnchor.description: For every euro you spend on Kleverbill, you recover this many euros in unpaid invoices, saved labour, and accelerated cash flow.

ctaSection.body: We'll show you where your current process is leaking revenue, what can be automated, and which plan fits your invoice volume.

resultsDisclaimer: Estimates are based on the information you provided and industry assumptions. Your actual recovery potential depends on invoice quality, customer payment behavior, and workflow setup.

Silver.description: A great starting point for lower-volume businesses.

Gold.description: Ideal for growing companies with regular invoice volume.

Platinum.description: Your volume, revenue, or unpaid rate puts you in our highest tier.

Enterprise.description: Your scale suggests a custom setup — multi-entity, high volume, or complex collections workflow.
features: Dedicated server & interface for debt collection

invoiceCountMode.required: Invoice count is required for this mode
